violations.text: The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Chicken wings were observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken wings were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Prep unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All foods in unit were evaluated at the time of inspection and were either moved to a working unit or voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, bacalhau was placed covered and hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Food was moved to sheet pans at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Pastel Filling, which was prepared in advance 5/7/24, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Food was being cooled in hotel pan that was to deep. Corrective Action - Filling was disposed of. Establishment to cool filling on baking sheets in walk in moving forward. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the upfront prep unit was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the coffee bar. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Ceiling tile through out the establishment are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment must replaced damaged tile with ones that are smooth durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024
